message:
So there I was, just lounging on the couch with my pup, Charlie, when the thunderstorm rolled in out of nowhere. You know the kind—dark clouds, loud booms, and poor Charlie suddenly convinced the sky was about to swallow us whole! 🌩️

I grabbed my phone to reassure him (and myself), and before I knew it, our family group chat was alive with messages. My sister sent a meme about dogs and storms, my mom shared a tip about making a cozy spot for pets, and my brother chimed in with his own dog’s hilarious storm antics. It turned into a mini support group for all of us pet parents!

In between the laughs, it hit me: being prepared isn't just about supplies. It's also about sharing those moments with family, finding comfort together, and knowing we all face the unexpected. 

If you haven’t thought about your pet’s comfort during storms, it’s a good reminder to keep a little plan in place—this little refresher helped! How do you keep your furry friends calm during a storm?
